title: Tuff Copper Golems
description: Adds 68 Tuff Golem skins for the Copper Golem!
body:
_(Want more Copper Age content? Check out [**Oxidizing Copper Equipment**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/oxidizing-copper-equipment)!)_ Adds 68 new **Tuff Golem textures** as alternative skins for Copper Golems! OptiFine or Entity Texture Features (ETF) is required for this pack to work as intended. ## Features: ### With OptiFine or ETF: - **68 alternate Tuff Golem textures** for Copper Golems! - Copper Golems can become Tuff Golems by naming them to "_Tuff Golem_" (case insensitive). - Tuff Golems can be given a cloak by preceding their name with one of the 16 dye colors ("_Red Tuff Golem_", etc.). - Tuff Golems age from a polished texture to a more rough texture over time, unless waxed.
